### DougDoug  101

![DougPepper.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/08e73c_37258cf43b3b45c598333c670c693938~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_180,h_180,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/DougPepper.png)

I'm a bell pepper who teaches how to play videogames good.

​

About DougDoug:  
Doug is a sentient bell pepper who was hired by the FBI to crack gaming challenges and also talk about things with food

![Blackboard.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/08e73c_51b207caee704295b890a1824038ad1b~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_651,h_366,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Blackboard.png)

## Principal's Note

I generally stream 2-4 times a week, between Sunday and Thursday.  
Unfortunately my stream days aren't planned in advance, but if you join the discord you'll get a notification when I go live.

​

​

I start streams around 12pm PT

(3pm ET | 20:00 BT | 21:00 CET)

but I'm usually late

## Help us fund the Academy

[![TwitchGlitchWhite.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/08e73c_a1757a77b1a14317897b2da3f6f671e1~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_52,h_60,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/TwitchGlitchWhite.png)](https://www.twitch.tv/dougdoug)

[![Paypal.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/08e73c_b438f5b80ad148cabf229e6467c6e8d5~mv2.png/v1/crop/x_390,y_317,w_1195,h_1354/fill/w_61,h_70,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Paypal.png)](https://streamlabs.com/dougdougw)

##### [Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/dougdoug)

##### [PayPal](https://streamlabs.com/dougdougw)

![NSwitch_PaperMarioTheOrigamiKing_Overvie](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/08e73c_f37d0857341f409bafcbb2691650af68~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_0,y_333,w_575,h_867/fill/w_327,h_498,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/NSwitch_PaperMarioTheOrigamiKing_Overvie.jpg)

Donating 300 bits or more shows up on stream! I can't guarantee I'll respond to every donation but I try to reply to most.  
Twitch Bits are actually more expensive to buy on mobile devices, due to Apple and Google's fees. Try purchasing on bits on your PC for a better deal.

​

If you prefer Paypal, the "Donate" image above links to my Paypal, $3 or above gets read on stream

Note: Paypal takes 33 cents of every transaction. So if you're donating $2 or less, it's better to use twitch's bits, since otherwise Paypal just takes most of it.

Donating or subscribing is not required in the slightest - please only donate if you are financially comfortable.

#### How to Donate
